# Development Rules

✔ Complete one module before starting another.

✔ Test every module.

✔ Freeze completed modules.

✔ Avoid redesigning completed code.

✔ JSON remains the source of truth.

✔ SQLite is used for indexing and retrieval.

✔ Keep notebooks for testing only.

✔ Production code lives inside core/.

# Notes

Research Navigator is no longer in the planning stage.

Every coding session should produce one complete deliverable.
